name: metrics.export
description: Export metrics data to JSON, CSV, or Parquet format for offline analysis. Supports filtering by date range, specific metrics, and optional inclusion of raw telemetry events.

start_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter from this date

end_date.description: Optional ISO format date (YYYY-MM-DD) to filter up to this date

metrics.description: Optional list of specific metrics to include (empty = all metrics)

include_raw_events.description: Whether to include raw telemetry events in export

export_id.description: Unique identifier for this export operation

size_bytes.description: Size of exported data in bytes

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when export was created

file_path.description: Path to exported file (null if inline data)

data.description: Inline exported data (present if file_path is null)
